description_long: This is a large, ornate house with a steeply pitched, dark slate roof featuring multiple gables, dormers, and a prominent central spire. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely stucco or painted stone, with decorative stonework at the base and around the windows. Several tall, red brick chimneys rise above the roofline, adding to the vertical emphasis of the structure. The house sits on a landscaped plot with a paved driveway, a curved walkway, and a stone perimeter wall. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some bay windows and decorative trim. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with pointed arches and ornate woodwork, reflecting a Victorian architectural influence.
description: A grand Victorian-style house with steep gabled roofs, ornate trim, and a mix of stone and stucco walls, set on a landscaped lot with a stone wall and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, pointed arches, and the central spire above the steep roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, tall chimneys, and the continuation of the driveway and walkway.
description_view_2: Rear/side view displaying the stone perimeter wall, multiple gables, and a large bay window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tall brick chimneys, secondary entry, and the mix of rooflines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and decorative trim
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with pointed arches, ornate woodwork, and steps leading up to a prominent door
